subject: WM-0170 blocked
body: Public owner APIs cannot satisfy the reviewed owner-version and zero-allocation contract within allowedPaths: WorkOfferIndex has no row/index owner version and materializes read/selection objects; GridPathfinder allocates result paths; ReservationLedger.acquire allocates prepared/claim-id arrays; M3AbilityCacheStore.queryAbility materializes results. A reviewed prerequisite must add version-bound, caller-owned output/scratch surfaces or revise the acceptance contract. Evidence: coordination/reports/WM-0170-plan.md and coordination/reports/WM-0170.md.
